features: Landing Page with Hero, Services, Routes, Pricing, FAQs, and Contact
Dynamic routing for individual route pages
High-resolution AI-generated assets for cars and locations

patterns: Use mix-blend-multiply with CSS brightness/contrast to achieve transparent backgrounds for generated images
Use CSS clamp() and whitespace-nowrap for responsive, non-wrapping text on small mobile screens
gotchas: AI-generated car images often include padding and off-white backgrounds; use scale and contrast tweaks to fix
